message:
build: update dependencies and add identity FTS cleanup test

Root Cargo.toml:
- Add workspace dependencies for new crates (model2vec, fastembed,
  half, rayon) used by two-tier search
- Update existing dependency versions

Cargo.lock:
- Lockfile updated with resolved dependency tree including new
  semantic search dependencies

DB Crate (Cargo.toml, schema.rs):
- Add dependencies required for enhanced pool and search features
- Minor schema adjustments for new index types

New Test:
- identity_fts_cleanup.rs: Test for FTS index cleanup when agent
  identities are deleted, ensuring no orphaned index entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
